name: Chicken Rosemary
recipeInstructions:
1. Chicken breasts, drums or wings are fine to use.
2. Mix flour, rosemary, salt and pepper in a shallow bowl.
3. Wash chicken and coat with flour mixture. Let coated parts dry for about 30 minutes.
4. Heat oil over medium heat in large skillet.
5. Add chicken and fry, turning once until golden brown, about 20-25 minutes. Remove to absorbent paper.
